messages.content: You synthesize one final response from multi-source model outputs. Use only the provided aggregate metrics and source excerpts. Do not invent external facts. If data conflicts, state the range and uncertainty briefly. Write one concise final answer.

Synthesize one response using the instruction and structured synthesis input below.
Prefer aggregate numbers for averages where available. Mention uncertainty when sources disagree.

{
  "instruction": "Synthesize one final weather summary for Indianapolis. Include weighted average temperature, weighted average wind, condition consensus, and rain risk.",
  "synthesis_mode": "weather",
  "source_job_ids": [
    "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78"
  ],
  "aggregate": {
    "completed_sources": 5,
    "failed_sources": [],
    "temperature": {
      "weighted_avg_f": 64.9,
      "weighted_avg_c": 18.3,
      "min_f": 58.0,
      "max_f": 76.0
    },
    "wind": {
      "weighted_avg_mph": 13.8,
      "min_mph": 12.5,
      "max_mph": 15.0
    },
    "rain": {
      "consensus_risk": "moderate",
      "max_precip_chance_pct": 97.0
    },
    "conditions": {
      "consensus": "stormy",
      "weighted_scores": {
        "cloudy": 1.1,
        "rainy": 1.0,
        "stormy": 3.65
      }
    },
    "prefer_best_sources": true,
    "per_source": [
      {
        "source": "git-inceptionlabs",
        "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
        "weight": 1.1,
        "temperature_f": 59.9,
        "temperature_c": 15.5,
        "wind_mph": null,
        "precip_chance_pct": null,
        "condition": "cloudy",
        "rain_risk": "unknown"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-chatgpt",
        "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
        "weight": 1.0,
        "temperature_f": 58.0,
        "temperature_c": 14.4,
        "wind_mph": 12.5,
        "precip_chance_pct": null,
        "condition": "rainy",
        "rain_risk": "moderate"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-grok",
        "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
        "weight": 1.35,
        "temperature_f": 72.0,
        "temperature_c": 22.2,
        "wind_mph": 15.0,
        "precip_chance_pct": 60.0,
        "condition": "stormy",
        "rain_risk": "moderate"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-qwen",
        "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
        "weight": 1.35,
        "temperature_f": 59.0,
        "temperature_c": 15.0,
        "wind_mph": 13.5,
        "precip_chance_pct": 97.0,
        "condition": "stormy",
        "rain_risk": "high"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-perplexity",
        "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
        "weight": 0.95,
        "temperature_f": 76.0,
        "temperature_c": 24.4,
        "wind_mph": null,
        "precip_chance_pct": null,
        "condition": "stormy",
        "rain_risk": "high"
      }
    ]
  },
  "source_excerpts": [
    {
      "source": "git-inceptionlabs",
      "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Weather for Indianapolis, Indiana, United States: Current 15.5C (59.9F), Overcast. Today high/low: 24.3C/12.2C (75.7F/54.0F). Wind: 17.1 km/h. Source: Open-Meteo live API on 2026-04-27 13:27 UTC"
    },
    {
      "source": "git-chatgpt",
      "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Indianapolis, IN: 58°F, mostly cloudy. Light rain possible this afternoon. Winds S at 10–15 mph.\n(Telegram update ready for delivery.)"
    },
    {
      "source": "git-grok",
      "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Indianapolis, IN (as of ~1:26 PM EDT, Apr 27 2026): ~70-74°F, mostly cloudy with showers likely and scattered thunderstorms possible this afternoon. Winds SSE 10-20 mph (gusts to 25+ mph). Rain risk moderate (40-60% chance, potential 0.25-0.5\" accumulation); watch for brief heavy downpours or thunder.\nTelegram update ready: \"Indy weather now: 72°F, cloudy w/ showers & t-storm risk. Winds SSE 15 mph. Moderate rain chance afternoon—grab umbrella.\""
    },
    {
      "source": "git-qwen",
      "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "🌤️ Indianapolis, IN — Weather Update\nMon, Apr 27, 1:26 PM UTC\n• Current: 59°F, mostly cloudy\n• Today: High 76° / Low 61°\n• Conditions: Breezy, warm; scattered thunderstorms developing this afternoon\n• Rain Risk: ⚠️ High (71–97% chance PM–overnight); 1–2\" possible; storms may bring hail/damaging winds\n• Wind: SE 10–17 mph now, increasing to SSE 25–35 mph tonight with gusts\n🔹 Telegram delivery note: This summary is formatted for your Telegram channel/bot. If a specific recipient was intended, please confirm the chat/user ID for routing.\n+19"
    },
    {
      "source": "git-perplexity",
      "source_job_id": "job_4d8aca2fb0114f78",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Here’s the current weather for Indianapolis, IN, USA:\nTemperature: around 76°F (24°C)\nConditions: Breezy with clouds and some sun; a few showers and a thunderstorm possible later today\nRain/wind risk: Elevated thunderstorm risk this afternoon/evening; gusty winds possible with storms\nTelegram-style update:\nIndianapolis, IN — 76°F, breezy with sun breaks; isolated showers possible this afternoon; storms may bring brief heavy rain and gusty winds tonight. Stay updated."
    }
  ]
}
